objects.name: n_arduino

_ldraw_.text: Converts cmd_vel into Arduino V/X serial

objects.label:
mecanum_serial_bridge
Converts cmd_vel into Arduino V/X serial
commands and integrates encoder deltas
into nav_msgs/Odometry on /odom.

objects.name: n_cam

_ldraw_.text: Pulls JPEG frames from the USB webcam
via GStreamer and republishes them as

objects.label:
gstreamer_camera
Pulls JPEG frames from the USB webcam
via GStreamer and republishes them as
CompressedImage on camera1/image_raw.

objects.name: n_yolo

_ldraw_.text: Runs YOLO + ByteTrack on every camera

objects.label:
vision_inference_service
Runs YOLO + ByteTrack on every camera
frame and serves on-demand detection,
property, and rotated-AR queries.

objects.name: n_sel

_ldraw_.text: Picks the best detection from the latest
YOLO frame using a class-priority list.

objects.label:
object_selection_node
Picks the best detection from the latest
YOLO frame using a class-priority list.

objects.name: n_xyz
objects.label:
bbox_to_xyz_node
Maps a 2D bounding-box center into
arm-frame millimetres using calibration.

objects.name: n_floor

_ldraw_.text: Builds a binary floor mask from the
camera frame for use by whisker rays.

objects.label:
wskr_floor
Builds a binary floor mask from the
camera frame for use by whisker rays.

objects.name: n_range

_ldraw_.text: the floor mask and the tracked bbox to

objects.label:
wskr_range
Marches 11 calibrated whisker rays over
the floor mask and the tracked bbox to
produce floor + target distance arrays.

objects.name: n_dr

_ldraw_.text: Fuses the latest visual heading with

objects.label:
wskr_dead_reckoning
Fuses the latest visual heading with
integrated yaw-rate from /odom and
publishes mode + heading-to-target.

objects.name: n_auto

_ldraw_.text: MLP that turns whisker fan + heading

objects.label:
wskr_autopilot
MLP that turns whisker fan + heading
into a Twist on WSKR/cmd_vel.

objects.name: n_approach
objects.label:
wskr_approach_action
ApproachObject server: ArUco/CSRT
tracking, autopilot gating, and the
per-frame ArUco marker publisher.

_ldraw_.text: Sole owner of the xArm USB device;
exposes every controller method as a

objects.label:
xarm_hardware_node
Sole owner of the xArm USB device;
exposes every controller method as a
service plus a play_waypoints action.

objects.name: n_grasp
objects.label:
grasping_commander_action_node
XArm grasp action server: chains
perception, Q-learning, GA planning,

_ldraw_.text: Looks up the best wrist angle for a

objects.label:
q_learning_wrist_node
Looks up the best wrist angle for a
given aspect ratio from a CSV policy.

objects.label:
state_manager_node
